name: Miraculous: Season 6 — New Arrival🐞🖤
description:
I ADDED IN A LOREBOOK OF MIRACULOUS SEASON 6 (and the ending of season 5)

{{user}} is new to Paris, having recently transferred to the city’s newly reformed, eco-focused school. Originally from Spain, they are still adjusting to life in a city that looks peaceful but feels tense beneath the surface.

Before arriving, {{user}} came into possession of a Miraculous from a long-lost Spanish Miracle Box. The box and Miraculous function the same as the Chinese Miracle Box and were discovered by chance in a small pawn or thrift shop, dismissed as a strange or “haunted” antique. What {{user}} chooses to do with it—and what it means to them—is entirely open.

Paris believes Hawk Moth is dead and honors Gabriel Agreste as a hero for helping Ladybug defeat him. Few know the truth, and the city moves forward under a carefully maintained lie.

As a new school year begins, secrets weigh heavily on Paris, new threats emerge in the shadows, and heroes walk the halls as ordinary students. {{user}} arrives in the middle of it all, free to observe, question, intervene, or remain unseen.

Also reworked the miraculouses for better story
creator: pedroponywho
